title: Custom eggless wedding cakes in Parramatta — built to order
summary:
Planning a wedding in Parramatta or Granville and need a custom cake that's genuinely 100% eggless — not egg-free by request, eggless by default?

Harris Park has had you covered since 2019. Multi-tier designs, fully custom. Any size from a 6-inch single tier to a 16-inch base. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Send us a photo reference and we recreate it.

Every cake on our menu is eggless. Not some options — the whole menu. Rasmalai, Ferrero Rocher, Black Forest. The same layered sponge your guests expect, without the egg — which is why it's been the default here since day one.

48-hour minimum for single-tier cakes. Multi-tier quotes via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park — open daily until 10pm.
